description: Windows Services database with risk levels for GoldISO GUI. Risk: 0=Safe, 1=Moderate, 2=High/Critical

services.Name: wuauserv
services.Description: Enables the detection, download, and installation of updates for Windows.

services.Name: DiagTrack
services.Description: Enables the Connected User Experience and Telemetry service.

services.Name: BITS
services.Description: Transfers files in the background using idle bandwidth.

services.Name: WinDefend
services.Description: Helps protect users from malware and other threats.

services.Name: Spooler
services.Description: Loads files to memory for printing.

services.Name: WSearch
services.Description: Provides indexing and search capabilities.

services.Name: Themes
services.Description: Enables theme management.

services.Name: W32Time
services.Description: Synchronizes system time with NTP servers.

services.Name: Dhcp
services.Description: Registers and updates IP addresses for network adapters.

services.Name: Dnscache
services.Description: Caches Domain Name System (DNS) names for faster resolution.

services.Name: Netlogon
services.Description: Maintains a secure channel between this computer and domain controllers.

services.Name: RemoteRegistry
services.Description: Allows remote registry access. Security risk if enabled.

services.Name: lmhosts
services.Description: Provides NetBIOS over TCP/IP support.

services.Name: LanmanServer
services.Description: Supports file, print, and named-pipe sharing over the network.

services.Name: LanmanWorkstation
services.Description: Maintains client connections to network file and print shares.

services.Name: MRxdns
services.Description: DNS resolver optimization service.

services.Name: nsi
services.Description: Network Store Interface Service - notifies components of network changes.

services.Name: Power
services.Description: Manages power policies and battery notifications.

services.Name: ProfSvc
services.Description: Loads and unloads user profiles.

services.Name: SamSs
services.Description: Stores security information for local user accounts.

services.Name: Schedule
services.Description: Manages scheduled tasks.

services.Name: SENS
services.Description: Monitors system events and notifies COM+ Event System.

services.Name: ShellHWDetection
services.Description: Notifies applications of hardware changes.

services.Name: StateRepository
services.Description: Provides required infrastructure support for Windows Store.

services.Name: StorSvc
services.Description: Manages storage settings and operations.

services.Name: TrustedInstaller
services.Description: Installs, modifies, and removes software.

services.Name: UI0Detect
services.Description: Detects interactive services and enables session 0 isolation.

services.Name: UmRdpService
services.Description: Supports Remote Desktop connection redirection.

services.Name: UxSms
services.Description: Provides composition effects for the desktop.

services.Name: VSS
services.Description: Manages volume shadow copies for backups.

services.Name: WbioSrvc
services.Description: Provides biometric services (fingerprint, face recognition).

services.Name: Wcmsvc
services.Description: Manages wired and wireless network connections.

services.Name: wcncsvc
services.Description: Processes configuration requests for Windows Connect Now.

services.Name: WinHttpAutoProxySvc
services.Description: Discovers proxy settings for WinHTTP.

services.Name: WlanSvc
services.Description: Manages wireless network connections.
